arts.ttl: Tottenham Suffer Blow as Report Confirms Real Madrid Keen on £50M-Rated PSG Target
arts.sum: Last summer, Paris Saint-Germain showed interest in Dean Huijsen as part of their plan to strengthen their defense, but the Spanish center-back ended up joining AFC Bournemouth. If PSG targets him again, they’ll face stiff competition. arts.ttl: Arne Slot's Southampton fury revealed by key Liverpool duo
arts.sum: Arne Slot's patience was tested during Liverpool's 3-1 win over Southampton after a dreary first 45 minutes saw the Premier League leaders fall behind.

arts.ttl: Liverpool shock Arsenal to set up FA Cup semi-final against Chelsea
arts.sum: The other semi-final will see City meet United in a Manchester derby

arts.ttl: Harvey Elliott Makes Bold Claim That No Goalkeeper Could Do What Alisson Did Against PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain created plenty of chances in their 1-0 first-leg loss to Liverpool on Wednesday night at Parc des Princes, but goalkeeper Alisson Becker was the star of the show, keeping PSG off the scoreboard. The Ligue 1 side controlled the game, outshooting Liverpool 27-2, but couldn’t find the back of the net. arts.ttl: 'Performance of my life' - Liverpool saved by 'best in world' Alisson
arts.sum: Alisson is described as "the best goalkeeper in the world" after his heroics help Liverpool produce a smash-and-grab performance to beat Paris St-Germain.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Consider Man Utd, PSG Target Too Expensive, Prioritize Florian Wirtz
arts.sum: Last summer, Paris Saint-Germain showed interest in Dean Huijsen as part of their efforts to strengthen their defense, but the Spanish center-back ended up joining AFC Bournemouth. arts.ttl: Keane: Forget Liverpool - Arsenal should be worried about teams behind them
arts.sum: Arsenal's Premier League title hopes are over and they should be more worried about securing Champions League qualification than catching Liverpool, according to Sky Sports pundit Roy Keane.

arts.ttl: 'It's over' - Paul Merson concedes Premier League title to Liverpool after Arsenal draw at Man Utd
arts.sum: Arsenal extended their winless run to three matches as they needed a late Declan Rice equaliser to reduce their deficit to Liverpool to 15 points

arts.ttl: Liverpool Drops £42M Opening Bid for Chelsea, PSG Transfer Target Open to Anfield Switch
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly among several clubs, including Chelsea, Liverpool, and Bayern Munich, interested in Joao Pedro as the summer transfer window nears. Transfer expert Graeme Bailey reported last December that Chelsea, Liverpool, Bayern Munich, and PSG all have their eyes on Pedro. arts.ttl: Liverpool Want to Sign 'One of the Most Exciting Young Players in the World'
arts.sum: According to reports, Liverpool are the latest team to register interest in this young Georgian sensation.
